dj_text: Switching it up! Aqua - Barbie Girl [Medieval Style Cover] done, Backstreet Boys - I Want It That Way [Medieval Style Cover] coming!
commercial_text: Introducing 'Jibberjabble Waves', your medieval-medieval mix of pop and beats that transcend dimensions!
recovery_text: And STAY off our frequency! Go back to your own dimension!
title: Backstreet Boys - I Want It That Way [Medieval Style Cover]
